## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or operational result.

## Verification

- [ ] Formatting, lint and type checks pass
- [ ] Unit/integration tests pass
- [ ] Browser tests pass when UI behavior changed
- [ ] Security and responsible-use impact reviewed
- [ ] Documentation and demo data updated where relevant

## Screenshots or traces

Include before/after evidence for visual changes. Remove secrets, private URLs and personal data.

## Risk and rollback

State migration, queue, retention or compatibility risks and how to reverse the change.
